LK NEHR Sri Lanka Patient Summary (IPS based) Implementation Guide, published by Ministry of Health, Sri Lanka. This guide is not an authorized publication; it is the continuous build for version 0.1.0 built by the FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) CI Build. This version is based on the current content of https://github.com/lk-gov-health-hiu/lk-nehr-fhir-ips and changes regularly. See the Directory of published versions

Tube</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001115<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001115"> </a></td><td>Permethrin shampoo 1%w/v, 60ml Bot.</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001116<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001116"> </a></td><td>Bacitracin Ointment 500 Units in each gram</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001201<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001201"> </a></td><td>Paclitaxel Injection 300mg/50mL (6mg) Vial</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001202<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001202"> </a></td><td>Interferon beta 1a 36 MIU (132mcg) /1.5mL Sterile Pre-Filled Pen</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001203<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001203"> </a></td><td>Cyclophosphamide for Injection 500mg Vial (Single dose)</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001204<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001204"> </a></td><td>Leucovorin Calcium Tablet 10mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001205<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001205"> </a></td><td>Sunitinib Malate 25mg Capsule</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001206<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001206"> </a></td><td>Sunitinib Malate 37.5mg Capsule</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001207<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001207"> </a></td><td>Everolimus 2mg tablet for oral suspension</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001208<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001208"> </a></td><td>Everolimus 3mg Tablet for Oral Suspension</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001209<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001209"> </a></td><td>Everolimus 5mg Tablet for Oral Suspension</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001210<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001210"> </a></td><td>Docetaxel Injection 160mg per 16mL (10mg per mL), Vial</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001211<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001211"> </a></td><td>Docetaxel Injection 80mg per 8mL (10mg per mL), Vial</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001301<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001301"> </a></td><td>Oxytocin Injection 10IU/mL Ampoule</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001302<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001302"> </a></td><td>Desogestrel 0.15mg/Ethinyl Estradiol 0.02mg Tablet and Ethinyl Estradiol 0.01mg Tablet</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001401<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001401"> </a></td><td>Allopurinol Tablet 300mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001402<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001402"> </a></td><td>Meloxicam Capsule 7.5mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001403<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001403"> </a></td><td>Celecoxib Tablet 200mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001404<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001404"> </a></td><td>Mefenamic acid Tablet 250mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001405<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001405"> </a></td><td>Baricitinib Tablet 4mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001406<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001406"> </a></td><td>Hydroxychloroquine Sulfate Tablet 300mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001407<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001407"> </a></td><td>Ketorolac Tromethamine 10 mg Tablet</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001501<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001501"> </a></td><td>Ketamine (as hydrochloride) solution for injection 200mg in 2mL ampoule</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001502<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001502"> </a></td><td>Bupivacaine Injection 0.5%, 20mL Vial with preservatives</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001503<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001503"> </a></td><td>Dexmedetomidine HCl in 0.9% NaCl Inj. 400mcg/100mL (4mcg/mL) Bot.</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001504<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001504"> </a></td><td>Hydrocortisone Acetate, Lidocaine, Aluminium subacetate, Zinc oxide Rectal Ointment in 15g Tube</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001601<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001601"> </a></td><td>Pralidoxime Iodide Injection NFI, 25mg/mL, 20mL Ampoule for IM/ Slow IV use</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001701<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001701"> </a></td><td>Ferrous Bis-glycinate 28mg+ Vitamin C 60mg+ Folic acid 400mcg+ Vitamin B12 8mcg Capsule</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001702<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001702"> </a></td><td>Calcium (as Carbonate)500mg+ Vitamin D 600IU Tablet</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001703<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001703"> </a></td><td>Fish oil 1000mg Capsule</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05001704<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05001704"> </a></td><td>Calcium Lactate Gluconate 2.94g+Calcium Carbonate 300mg Effervescent Tablet</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05007001<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05007001"> </a></td><td>Sitagliptin 100mg and Metformin Hydrochloride 1000mg Extended Release Tablet</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05010301<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05010301"> </a></td><td>Cetrimide Tincture 0.5%, 200mL Bottle</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05020001<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05020001"> </a></td><td>Mannitol 20% Intravenous Infusion 500mL Single dose container</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05020101<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05020101"> </a></td><td>Atenolol Tablet 100mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05020102<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05020102"> </a></td><td>Labetalol Hydrochloride Tablet 200mg</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05040101<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05040101"> 200mL Bottle</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05040202<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05040202"> </a></td><td>Branched chain Amino Acid (Methionine 200mg/ Choline 200mg)</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">05040401<a name="cs-medication-name-msd-05040401"> </a></td><td>Disposable Infusion set (Non-Vented)</td></tr></table></div>
